metadata.description: Batch 26 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 2501-2600; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: the people who work for an organization
a raised area for performance or a step in a process
words.definitionTh: เวที / ขั้นตอน
words.example: The project has entered the testing stage.

words.definitionEn: one step in a staircase
words.example: Use the handrail on each stair.

words.definitionEn: a small official label; to mark with an official tool
words.definitionTh: แสตมป์ / ประทับตรา

words.definitionEn: to be upright on the feet; a position or opinion
words.definitionTh: ยืน / จุดยืน
words.example: Do not stand near the moving conveyor.

words.definitionEn: an accepted level of quality; usual or normal
words.example: The design meets the required standard.

words.definitionEn: a bright object seen in the night sky
words.example: The star was visible at night.

words.definitionEn: to look at something for a long time
words.example: Do not stare directly at the light.

words.definitionEn: to begin; the beginning of something
words.example: Start the machine after the check.

words.definitionEn: a country area with its own government; a condition; to express formally
words.definitionTh: รัฐ / สถานะ
words.example: The display shows the current state.

words.definitionEn: a spoken or written declaration
words.definitionTh: ข้อความ / คำแถลง
words.example: The report contains a clear statement.

words.definitionEn: a place where trains, buses, or services operate
words.example: Move the sample to the inspection station.

words.definitionEn: a numerical fact or measurement
a figure made from stone, metal, or another material
words.example: The statue stands in the park.

words.definitionEn: the current condition or social position
to remain in a place for a period
firm and not changing suddenly
to take something without permission
words.example: It is illegal to steal company property.

words.definitionEn: a strong metal made mainly from iron
words.example: The frame is made of steel.

words.definitionEn: rising or falling at a sharp angle
one action in a process; to move by lifting a foot
a thin piece of wood; to attach or remain fixed
words.example: The label should stick to the surface.

words.definitionEn: able to stick to a surface
hard and difficult to bend
words.example: The cable is too stiff to bend.

words.definitionEn: continuing until now; without movement or noise
words.definitionTh: ยังคง / นิ่ง

words.definitionEn: goods kept for sale or use; to keep a supply
the organ that receives food
words.definitionTh: กระเพาะอาหาร
words.example: He felt pain in his stomach.

words.definitionEn: a hard natural mineral material
to end an activity or movement
a shop; to keep something for future use
words.definitionTh: ร้านค้า / เก็บ
words.example: Store the sample below zero degrees.

words.definitionEn: very bad weather with strong wind or rain
an account of events, real or imagined
words.example: The dashboard tells a clear story.

words.definitionEn: not curved; directly
unusual or unfamiliar
words.example: The motor made a strange noise.

words.definitionEn: a person you do not know
words.definitionTh: คนแปลกหน้า
words.example: Do not allow a stranger into the area.

words.definitionEn: a plan designed to achieve a long-term goal
words.example: The team defined a risk-reduction strategy.

words.definitionEn: a small river or continuous flow of data
words.definitionTh: ลำธาร / สตรีม
words.example: The camera sends a live data stream.

words.definitionEn: a public road in a town or city
words.example: The office is on the main street.

words.definitionEn: the ability to resist force or the quality of being strong
words.definitionTh: ความแข็งแรง

words.definitionEn: mental pressure; to emphasize
words.definitionTh: ความเครียด / เน้น

words.definitionEn: to make longer or extend the body
demanding exact obedience to rules
to hit; to refuse to work as a protest
words.definitionTh: ตี / นัดหยุดงาน
words.example: The tool may strike the guard.

words.definitionEn: a thin cord made of twisted fibres
words.definitionTh: เชือก / สาย

words.definitionEn: having great physical or mental power
with great strength or force
words.definitionTh: อย่างแข็งแรง
words.example: The evidence strongly supports the change.

words.definitionEn: the arrangement of parts forming a whole
a person studying at a school or university
a room used for art, recording, or broadcasting
words.example: The recording was made in a studio.

words.definitionEn: to learn about a subject; an investigation
words.definitionTh: ศึกษา / การศึกษา
words.example: The team conducted a feasibility study.

words.definitionEn: things or material without a specific name
words.example: Remove unnecessary stuff from the desk.

words.definitionEn: showing poor judgment or little intelligence
a particular way of doing or designing something
a topic, academic course, or person affected by an action
words.definitionTh: หัวข้อ / วิชา

words.definitionEn: to formally send a document or idea for consideration
a type of solid, liquid, or gas with particular properties
words.example: The container holds a hazardous substance.

words.definitionEn: to achieve the intended result
words.definitionTh: ประสบความสำเร็จ
words.example: The trial will succeed with accurate data.

words.definitionEn: the achievement of a goal
words.definitionTh: ความสำเร็จ

words.definitionEn: achieving the intended result
words.definitionTh: ประสบความสำเร็จ

words.definitionEn: in a way that achieves the intended result
words.definitionTh: อย่างประสบความสำเร็จ

words.definitionEn: of the type already mentioned
happening quickly and unexpectedly
words.example: A sudden pressure drop stopped the line.

words.definitionEn: in a quick and unexpected way
words.definitionTh: อย่างกะทันหัน

words.definitionEn: to experience pain, difficulty, or loss
words.example: Quality may suffer during unstable operation.

words.definitionEn: a sweet substance used in food
to put forward an idea for consideration
words.example: The data suggests a mechanical cause.

words.definitionEn: an idea or plan offered for consideration
a set of clothes; to be right or convenient for
words.definitionTh: ชุด / เหมาะสม

words.definitionEn: right or appropriate for a particular purpose
the total obtained by adding numbers
words.example: Calculate the sum of all values.

words.definitionEn: to give the main points in a short form
a short statement of the main points
words.example: The report begins with a summary.

words.definitionEn: the warmest season of the year
the star that gives Earth light and heat
words.definitionTh: ดวงอาทิตย์
words.example: The panel uses energy from the sun.

words.definitionEn: the day after Saturday
words.definitionTh: วันอาทิตย์
words.example: The factory is closed on Sunday.

words.definitionEn: a large shop selling food and household items
words.definitionTh: ซูเปอร์มาร์เก็ต
words.example: The product is sold in a supermarket.

words.definitionEn: to provide something; an amount available for use
words.definitionTh: จัดหา / อุปทาน
words.example: The valve controls the water supply.

words.definitionEn: to give help or approval; help that is given
a person who gives help or approval
words.definitionTh: ผู้สนับสนุน

words.definitionEn: to think something is probably true
confident that something is true
words.example: Make sure the guard is closed.

words.definitionEn: with confidence or certainty
words.definitionTh: อย่างแน่นอน
words.example: The change will surely improve accuracy.

words.definitionEn: the outer or top layer of something
medical treatment involving an operation
an unexpected event or feeling; to cause that feeling
words.definitionTh: ความประหลาดใจ / ทำให้ประหลาดใจ

words.definitionEn: feeling surprise
words.example: We were surprised by the result.

words.definitionEn: causing surprise
words.definitionTh: น่าประหลาดใจ
words.example: The test revealed a surprising pattern.

words.definitionEn: to be or place all around something
words.example: A guard should surround the moving part.

words.definitionEn: a set of questions or a detailed examination
words.definitionTh: แบบสำรวจ / สำรวจ
words.example: The team conducted an operator survey.

words.definitionEn: to continue living or existing after danger
to think someone may be guilty; a person thought to be guilty
words.definitionTh: สงสัย / ผู้ต้องสงสัย

words.definitionEn: to make a serious promise or use rude language
words.example: The witness had to swear to tell the truth.

words.definitionEn: a warm knitted top
words.definitionTh: เสื้อสเวตเตอร์

words.definitionEn: to clean or move with a brush
having the taste of sugar
words.example: The product has a sweet taste.

words.definitionEn: to move through water using the body
the activity or sport of moving through water
words.definitionTh: การว่ายน้ำ

words.definitionEn: a control for electrical flow; to change from one thing to another
words.definitionTh: สวิตช์ / เปลี่ยน

words.definitionEn: a mark or object representing an idea
understanding and care for someone’s suffering
words.definitionTh: ความเห็นอกเห็นใจ
words.example: We expressed sympathy to the family.
